=== RETRIEVED CONTEXT ===

MITRE:
T1110
Brute Force

Definition:
Many password guesses against one account or service.

Indicators:
High failure rate from one IP; SSH/RDP lockouts; IDS brute-force hits.

Recommendation:
Block source IP; reset targeted account; enable MFA.

=== END ===
